page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz with a 48 MB L3 cache. The instance is configured with 62.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.88 GB per core. For graphics and parallel computing workloads, it includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU (0.3333 allocation) with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most general compute and memory tasks. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1897.68 and a multi-core score of 28616.81, supported by hardware-accelerated instructions including AVX-512 and AES cryptography. Memory bandwidth reaches 1617.72 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 92.11 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. In language model inference, the fractional A10 GPU achieves a strong text generation speed of 258.41 tokens/sec on small 135M models, while medium 7B models process prompts at 32.87 tokens/sec and generate text at 10.13 tokens/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the fractional GPU allocation allows users to access hardware-accelerated graphics and inference capabilities without paying for a full GPU. This resource density makes it a viable option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not saturate a full physical card. Tradeoffs include the lack of local storage and a moderate 5 Gbps network baseline. This instance is suited for virtual workstations, lightweight deep learning inference, image processing, and general-purpose workloads requiring moderate GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 16 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz. It features 62.0 GB of system memory and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM, while lacking local storage and providing 5 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results show average performance across general compute, cryptography, and memory operations, with a strong text generation speed of 258.41 tokens/sec on small language models. The fractional GPU design offers a cost-efficient entry point for hardware-accelerated tasks without the expense of a full GPU. This instance is suited for virtual workstations, lightweight AI inference, image processing, and general-purpose applications requiring moderate GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 16 Intel Xeon cores, 62 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for virtual workstations and AI inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge features 16 Intel Xeon cores, 62 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU for cost-efficient graphics and inference.
tagline: A cost-efficient virtual server combining dedicated Intel Xeon processing with fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU acceleration for lightweight graphics and inference workloads.

Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
62.0 GB of system memory with 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong text generation performance on small language models
No local storage, requiring external block storage solutions
Suited for virtual workstations, image processing, and lightweight AI inference
